"'''Where Did All the Killiks Go?'''" was the signature [[Music/Legends|song]] of [[Dengar and the Destroyers]], a [[Band/Legends|band]] which performed at the club [[Bantha Traxx]] on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]].<ref name="Wretched Hives" />

{{Music-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
"Where Did All The Killiks Go?" was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] sourcebook ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', which was written by [[Paul Danner]] and published in [[1997]].<ref name="Wretched Hives" />
